title: Form UT-1 — Submit an Unbilled Transfer
medium: interactive web form styled as a municipal intake terminal. The viewer can file their own observed unbilled transfer and receive a case number. Every submission is stamped 'Closed — no action.' A seeded archive loads with three specimens from the principal memorandum.
caption: All submissions will be processed and filed without acknowledgement. The Office will file your submission. It will not act on it. That is the point.
